integrationStatus.typescript_best_practices: Empty - Need TypeScript best practices documentation

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from Microsoft TypeScript documentation, MDN Web Docs, and reputable JavaScript/TypeScript resources. Prioritize official Microsoft and MDN documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: spec_name.md, guide_name.html
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official Microsoft and MDN documentation.
instructions.tsjsFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand TypeScript language features, (2) use modern JavaScript ES6+ syntax, (3) follow TypeScript/JavaScript best practices, (4) implement Node.js patterns correctly, (5) support extension development with proper TypeScript usage.
